patches.hypothesis: The bug is due to a logical mistake where the function evaluation result was returned instead of the interpolated root value.
patches.changes: - return setResult() instead of yMin or yMax when an endpoint is detected as root
patches.diff: - return setResult() instead of yMin or yMax when an endpoint is detected as root

patches.hypothesis: The method sets the result to the function value instead of the point when the endpoint is the root.
patches.changes:
- return yMin instead of min when yMin is good enough
- return yMax instead of max when yMax is good enough
patches.diff:
- return yMin instead of min when yMin is good enough
- return yMax instead of max when yMax is good enough

patches.hypothesis: The method incorrectly returns function values instead of root values at valid endpoints.
patches.changes: - return setResult() with the endpoint value instead of returning the function value at the endpoint
patches.diff: - return setResult() with the endpoint value instead of returning the function value at the endpoint
